name: Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: Pillsbury Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough (or homemade)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the chocolate cookie dough from the fridge and let it come to room temperature before using.
2. Scald the milk in a saucepan until small bubbles form around the edges, then remove from heat.
3. Add sugar and salt to the scalded milk; stir until fully dissolved.
4. Stir in half-and-half, vanilla extract, and whipping cream. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
5. Freeze according to your ice cream machine's instructions. Once processed into a chilled soft ice cream, add the broken-up cookie dough.
6. Break up the dough and drop small clusters of it into the soft ice cream, stirring gently to ensure even distribution.
7. Transfer the mixture to the freezer for several hours until firm.
